name: AI Safety Governance Framework
owner: TC260 (National Information Security Standardization Technical Committee, China)
description: China's national AI safety governance framework — published by TC260 implementing the Global AI Governance Initiative. Defines AI risk categories and governance measures.
relationToCloudSecurity: Affects AI services operated within China or for Chinese users.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI governance framework from the Chinese national standards body.

license.notes: China TC260 standards committee publication. Verify license at tc260.org.cn before redistribution.
